array_types.name: DAC_SWTRGR_SWTRIG_Field_Array
array_types.code:
type DAC_SWTRGR_SWTRIG_Field_Array is array (1 .. 2) of Boolean
  with Component_Size => 1, Size => 2;

array_types.name: DAC_SWTRGR_SWTRIGB_Field_Array
array_types.code:
type DAC_SWTRGR_SWTRIGB_Field_Array is array (1 .. 2) of Boolean
  with Component_Size => 1, Size => 2;

record_types.name: DAC_CCR_Register
DAC_CR_Register

fields.name: TEN1
fields.description:
DAC channel1 trigger selection These bits select the external event
used to trigger DAC channel1. Note: Only used if bit TEN1 = 1 (DAC
channel1 trigger enabled).

fields.name: TSEL1
fields.description:
DAC channel1 noise/triangle wave generation enable These bits are set
and cleared by software. Note: Only used if bit TEN1 = 1 (DAC
channel1 trigger enabled).

fields.name: WAVE1
fields.description:
DAC channel1 mask/amplitude selector These bits are written by
software to select mask in wave generation mode or amplitude in
triangle generation mode. = 1011: Unmask bits[11:0] of LFSR/ triangle
amplitude equal to 4095

fields.name: MAMP1
fields.description: DAC channel1 DMA enable This bit is set and cleared by software.

fields.name: DMAEN1
fields.description:
DAC channel1 DMA Underrun Interrupt enable This bit is set and
cleared by software.

fields.name: DMAUDRIE1
fields.description:
DAC Channel 1 calibration enable This bit is set and cleared by
software to enable/disable DAC channel 1 calibration, it can be
written only if bit EN1=0 into DAC_CR (the calibration mode can be
entered/exit only when the DAC channel is disabled) Otherwise, the
write operation is ignored.

fields.name: Reserved_15_15
fields.description:
DAC channel2 enable This bit is set and cleared by software to
enable/disable DAC channel2.

fields.name: TEN2
fields.description:
DAC channel2 trigger selection These bits select the external event
used to trigger DAC channel2 Note: Only used if bit TEN2 = 1 (DAC
channel2 trigger enabled).

fields.name: TSEL2
fields.description:
DAC channel2 noise/triangle wave generation enable These bits are
set/reset by software. 1x: Triangle wave generation enabled Note:
Only used if bit TEN2 = 1 (DAC channel2 trigger enabled)

fields.name: WAVE2
fields.description:
DAC channel2 mask/amplitude selector These bits are written by
software to select mask in wave generation mode or amplitude in
triangle generation mode. = 1011: Unmask bits[11:0] of LFSR/ triangle
amplitude equal to 4095

fields.name: MAMP2
fields.description: DAC channel2 DMA enable This bit is set and cleared by software.

fields.name: DMAEN2
fields.description:
DAC channel2 DMA underrun interrupt enable This bit is set and
cleared by software.

fields.name: DMAUDRIE2
fields.description:
DAC Channel 2 calibration enable This bit is set and cleared by
software to enable/disable DAC channel 2 calibration, it can be
written only if bit EN2=0 into DAC_CR (the calibration mode can be
entered/exit only when the DAC channel is disabled) Otherwise, the
write operation is ignored.

record_types.name: DAC_DHR12L1_Register

fields.name: Reserved_0_3
fields.description:
DAC channel1 12-bit left-aligned data These bits are written by
software which specifies 12-bit data for DAC channel1.

record_types.name: DAC_DHR12L2_Register

fields.name: Reserved_0_3
fields.description:
DAC channel2 12-bit left-aligned data These bits are written by
software which specify 12-bit data for DAC channel2.

record_types.name: DAC_DHR12LD_Register

fields.name: Reserved_0_3
fields.description:
DAC channel1 12-bit left-aligned data These bits are written by
software which specifies 12-bit data for DAC channel1.

fields.name: Reserved_16_19
fields.description:
DAC channel2 12-bit left-aligned data These bits are written by
software which specifies 12-bit data for DAC channel2.

record_types.name: DAC_DHR12R1_Register
DAC_DHR12R2_Register
DAC_DHR12RD_Register

fields.name: Reserved_12_15
fields.description:
DAC channel2 12-bit right-aligned data These bits are written by
software which specifies 12-bit data for DAC channel2.

record_types.name: DAC_DHR8R1_Register
DAC_DHR8R2_Register
DAC_DHR8RD_Register

fields.name: DACC1DHR
fields.description:
DAC channel2 8-bit right-aligned data These bits are written by
software which specifies 8-bit data for DAC channel2.

record_types.name: DAC_DOR1_Register
DAC_DOR2_Register
DAC_MCR_Register

fields.name: Reserved_3_7
fields.description: DAC Channel1 DMA double data mode

fields.name: DMADOUBLE1
fields.description: Enable signed format for DAC channel1

fields.name: HFSEL
fields.description:
DAC Channel 2 mode These bits can be written only when the DAC is
disabled and not in the calibration mode (when bit EN2=0 and bit CEN2
=0 in the DAC_CR register). If EN2=1 or CEN2 =1 the write operation
is ignored. They can be set and cleared by software to select the DAC
Channel 2 mode: DAC Channel 2 in normal Mode DAC Channel 2 in sample
& hold mode

fields.name: Reserved_19_23
fields.description: DAC Channel2 DMA double data mode

fields.name: DMADOUBLE2
fields.description: Enable signed format for DAC channel2

record_types.name: DAC_Peripheral

fields.name: DAC_SWTRGR
fields.description: DAC channel1 12-bit right-aligned data holding register

fields.name: DAC_DHR12R1
fields.description: DAC channel1 12-bit left aligned data holding register

fields.name: DAC_DHR12L1
fields.description: DAC channel1 8-bit right aligned data holding register

fields.name: DAC_DHR8R1
fields.description: DAC channel2 12-bit right aligned data holding register

fields.name: DAC_DHR12R2
fields.description: DAC channel2 12-bit left aligned data holding register

fields.name: DAC_DHR12L2
fields.description: DAC channel2 8-bit right-aligned data holding register

fields.name: DAC_DHR8R2
fields.description: Dual DAC 12-bit right-aligned data holding register

fields.name: DAC_DHR12RD
fields.description: DUAL DAC 12-bit left aligned data holding register

fields.name: DAC_DHR12LD
fields.description: DUAL DAC 8-bit right aligned data holding register

fields.name: DAC_MCR
fields.description: DAC Sample and Hold sample time register 1

fields.name: DAC_SHSR1
fields.description: DAC Sample and Hold sample time register 2

fields.name: DAC_SHSR2
fields.description: DAC Sample and Hold hold time register

fields.name: DAC_SHHR
fields.description: DAC Sample and Hold refresh time register

record_types.name: DAC_SHHR_Register

fields.name: Reserved_10_15
fields.description:
DAC Channel 2 hold time (only valid in sample & hold mode). Hold
time= (THOLD[9:0]) x T LSI

record_types.name: DAC_SHRR_Register

fields.name: Reserved_8_15
fields.description:
DAC Channel 2 refresh Time (only valid in sample & hold mode)
Refresh time= (TREFRESH[7:0]) x T LSI

record_types.name: DAC_SHSR1_Register
DAC_SHSR2_Register
DAC_SR_Register

fields.name: DAC1RDY
fields.description: DAC channel1 output register status bit

fields.name: DORSTAT1
fields.description:
DAC channel1 DMA underrun flag This bit is set by hardware and
cleared by software (by writing it to 1).

fields.name: DMAUDR1
fields.description:
Read-only. DAC Channel 1 calibration offset status This bit is set
and cleared by hardware

fields.name: CAL_FLAG1
fields.description:
Read-only. DAC Channel 1 busy writing sample time flag This bit is
systematically set just after Sample & Hold mode enable and is set
each time the software writes the register DAC_SHSR1, It is cleared
by hardware when the write operation of DAC_SHSR1 is complete. (It
takes about 3LSI periods of synchronization).

fields.name: DAC2RDY
fields.description: DAC channel 2 output register status bit

fields.name: DORSTAT2
fields.description:
DAC channel2 DMA underrun flag This bit is set by hardware and
cleared by software (by writing it to 1).

fields.name: DMAUDR2
fields.description:
Read-only. DAC Channel 2 calibration offset status This bit is set
and cleared by hardware

fields.name: CAL_FLAG2
fields.description:
Read-only. DAC Channel 2 busy writing sample time flag This bit is
systematically set just after Sample & Hold mode enable and is set
each time the software writes the register DAC_SHSR2, It is cleared
by hardware when the write operation of DAC_SHSR2 is complete. (It
takes about 3 LSI periods of synchronization).

record_types.name: DAC_STMODR_Register

fields.name: Reserved_4_7
fields.description: DAC Channel 1 Sawtooth Increment trigger selection

fields.name: Reserved_12_15
fields.description: DAC Channel 1 Sawtooth Reset trigger selection

fields.name: Reserved_20_23
fields.description: DAC Channel 2 Sawtooth Increment trigger selection

record_types.name: DAC_STR1_Register

fields.name: Reserved_13_15
fields.description: DAC CH1 Sawtooth increment value (12.4 bit format)

record_types.name: DAC_STR2_Register

fields.name: Reserved_13_15
fields.description: DAC CH2 Sawtooth increment value (12.4 bit format)

record_types.name: DAC_SWTRGR_Register

fields.name: Reserved_2_15
fields.description: Write-only. DAC channel1 software trigger B

DAC_SWTRGR_SWTRIGB_Field

  with Import, Address => DAC1_Base;
